pr_title: SDLC-40: Fix knowledge base search to match substrings
pr_body:
## Summary
Adjust knowledge base search so it returns articles when the query appears anywhere in topic, title, or content, not just at the start of a field.

## What changed
- Updated the search predicate in `backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py`
- Preserved existing response shape and surrounding search behavior
- Added/updated tests for prefix and substring matches

## Validation
- Search terms appearing mid-field now return the matching article
- Existing prefix matches continue to work
- Non-matching queries still return no results

## Notes
- Minimal backend-only change; no schema or API contract changes expected
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
